reason: A 64-vCPU instance is unavailable. Execute the unchanged frozen docking protocol on one available 32-vCPU instance without oversubscribing Vina processes.

authorized_change.recommended_instance: at least 32 vCPU and 64 GB RAM; GPU is not used
authorized_change.estimated_wall_time: approximately 5-6 days for all three sequential seeds, with ligand-dependent variation

resume_policy: Each seed retains the existing output directory and uses --resume, so completed receptor-ligand jobs survive process or instance restarts.
interpretation_boundary: This amendment changes process concurrency only. It cannot change a receptor-ligand-seed score definition, model, metric, threshold, or scientific conclusion.
